title: Automation creates a column when another column changes
excerpt: Hi, So I have a board that was a checklist, in where a if a checkbox is marked it will update a date column with today’s date. Now I would like to create another automation that once a week has passed it will clear the c…

posts.author: Victoria_Martinez (Victoria Martinez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, So I have a board that was a checklist, in where a if a checkbox is marked it will update a date column with today’s date. Now I would like to create another automation that once a week has passed it will clear the checkbox column and create a new date column.

posts.author: ChrisBuna (Chris Buna - Simplified Workflows)
posts.cookedHtml: Why do you want a new date column?

posts.author: Victoria_Martinez (Victoria Martinez)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your question. Just realized the Last updated activity column from Monday will work.

posts.author: ChrisBuna (Chris Buna - Simplified Workflows)
posts.cookedHtml:
If the goal is to track a history of when the checkbox was done you could do the following:

  1. create a log board.
  2. when checkbox is marked create & connect an item in log board.
  3. In log board, when item is create set date as today.
